case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LESLEY SARAHI SOLARES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLARES, LESLEY SARAHI $414.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $494.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $649.41 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SOLARES, LESLEY SARAHI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SOLARES, LESLEY SARAHI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LESLEY SARAHI SOLARES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED MAY-06-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SOLARES, LESLEY SARAHI
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
